zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Avenal於大約1166年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親William d'Avenal37歲，母親Helewise Waard38歲。她和Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1195年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Avenal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

variants.name: Aveni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Avenal was born about 1166, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William d'Avenal, was 37 and her mother, Helewise Waard, was 38. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote. She died about 1195, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Avenal est née environ 1166, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Avenal, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helewise Waard, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote. Elle est décédée environ 1195, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Avenal um 1166 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Avenal 37 und ihre Mutter Helewise Waard 38. Sie hatte mit Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1195 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Avenal è nata il circa 1166 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William d'Avenal, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Helewise Waard, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote. Morì circa 1195, nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Avenalが約1166年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William d'Avenalは37歳，母Helewise Waardは38歳であった。彼女はSir Simon Basset of Sapcoteとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1195年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Avenal(이)가 대략 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Avenal(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise Waard(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Avenal nasceu aproximadamente 1166, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William d'Avenal, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helewise Waard, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1195, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Avenal родилась около 1166 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William d'Avenal было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise Waard, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote. Она умерла около 1195 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
